summary: Service Orchestration Pack testing completed. Backend: 28/28 API tests passed (100%). Frontend: All public pages (/services, /services/{groupSlug}, /services/{groupSlug}/{serviceSlug}) working correctly. Admin pages (/admin/service-catalog, /admin/blank-products) tested and working after fixing a critical bug in BlankProductsPage.jsx.

fixed_bugs.issue: Runtime error: 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string' - page was crashing on load
fixed_bugs.fix: Changed empty string value to 'all' for category filter SelectItem

features: 4 service groups from backend (Printing, Creative, Uniforms, Installation)
Hero section with 'Request a Quote' button
Service category cards with service badges
Group title and description from backend
3 services displayed (Business Cards, Brochures & Flyers, Banners & Signage)
Pricing info display (Quote-based, Visit Fee: TZS 50,000)
'Product Selection' badge for services with blanks
'Your Information' form section (Name, Email, Phone, Company)
Edit and Delete actions for each item
Empty state message when no products
Add Product modal with all fields (Name, SKU, Category, Subcategory, Description, Sizes, Colors, Materials, Branding Methods, Base Cost, Min Order Qty, Lead Time, Tailoring Supported, Active)

admin_blank_products.GET /api/admin/blank-products: PASS - Returns all products with costs

integration_tests.full_service_catalog_flow: PASS - Create group → Create type → Public visibility
integration_tests.inactive_items_not_public: PASS - Inactive items hidden from public endpoints

critical_code_review_comments: All API endpoints follow proper RESTful patterns
Public endpoints correctly hide sensitive data (base_cost)
Inactive items properly filtered from public endpoints
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Orchestration Pack fully tested. All backend APIs working correctly. Public pages (/services, /services/{groupSlug}, /services/{groupSlug}/{serviceSlug}) display dynamic data from backend. Admin pages (/admin/service-catalog, /admin/blank-products) working correctly after fixing SelectItem empty value bug. Seeded data includes 4 service groups and 5 service types. No blank products seeded yet (empty state shown).
